cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, Mr. Mandal! This is Ramesh from Air India Miles. How are you today, sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm doing well, thank you. What's this call about, ji?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: We're excited to inform you that you've accumulated enough points for a free flight upgrade on your next trip! Isn't that great news, sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: That sounds wonderful. How do I go about claiming this upgrade, Achha?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 42s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: An agent from an airline's loyalty program ([AIRLINE_COMPANY] Miles) calls a frequent flyer to inform them that they have accumulated enough points for a free flight upgrade on their next trip and explains how to claim it through the official app.
